text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go to visit Silence Suzuka in the prep room
before the race only to discover she isn't there.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list: Did you go for a run?
Did you go for a run?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I got the itch, so I did a lap around the
racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It looks like it's about time...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'll give everything I have to reach the front...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I won't give up the lead to anyone.
